👗 Dress Code Smart Casual

Our Story 💕
☕

The First Meeting

It started with a shared smile across a crowded room — a chance encounter that neither of us could have planned. In that moment, something quietly shifted, and the world felt a little smaller and a lot warmer.

💬

Getting to Know Each Other

Long conversations that stretched past midnight, shared laughs over small things, and the slow discovery that we saw the world through wonderfully similar eyes. Every talk felt like finding a missing piece.

🌟

We Knew It Was Love

It wasn't one big moment — it was a hundred quiet ones. The way he remembered every little detail she mentioned. The way she made every ordinary day feel like an adventure worth having.

💍

The Proposal

Under the stars, with a heart full of dreams and a ring that caught the light just right, Fares got down on one knee. Through happy tears, Nada said yes — and their forever began right there.

🎊

And Now... The Big Day!

Two hearts, one beautiful promise. We are overjoyed to celebrate this milestone with the people who matter most to us. Thank you for being part of our love story — we cannot wait to see you there!
